$comment: Test cases for cycle state machine transitions. Each case has: name, description, sequence (array of {action, input} executed in order starting from a fresh cycle), expectedFields (partial Cycle field snapshots — only key fields asserted, not full cycle), assertions (list of additional behavioral assertions). Placeholder conventions: '<iso-string>' = field must be a non-empty ISO datetime string; '<date-string>' = YYYY-MM-DD; '<uuid>' = non-empty id string; '<positive-int>' = positive integer; null = field absent/undefined. Based on Cycle/PauseRecord/RestartRecord/BatchProcessRecord interfaces in cycle.ts and activeCycle computed in cycleStore.ts (activeCycle returns null when status is 'terminated' or 'completed').

cases.name: a. create cycle — status active, activeCycle excludes terminated/completed
cases.description: Creating a new cycle sets status 'active' with empty histories; the cycle is reachable via activeCycle; activeCycle excludes any cycle whose status is 'terminated' or 'completed'.
assertions: activeCycle !== null (cycle is the active cycle)
getCompletedCycles() does not include this cycle
activeCycle computed returns null when cycle.status === 'terminated' or 'completed' (cycleStore line: if (cycle.status === 'terminated' || cycle.status === 'completed') return null)

cases.name: b. pause cycle (reason 'holiday') — status paused, currentPause set, pauseHistory +1
cases.description: Pausing an active cycle sets status 'paused', isPaused true, populates currentPause, and appends an entry to pauseHistory.
assertions: currentPause.pausedAt is a non-null ISO datetime string

cases.name: c. resume cycle (option 'postpone') — status active, currentPause cleared, pauseHistory[0] finalized
cases.description: Resuming a paused cycle with 'postpone' option sets status back to 'active', clears currentPause, finalizes the pauseHistory entry with resumedAt/resumeOption/daysShifted, and shifts subsequent scheduled dates forward.
assertions: pauseHistory[0].resumedAt is a non-null ISO datetime string
pauseHistory[0].daysShifted > 0 (equals the pause duration in days)
scheduledDate of subsequent training days shifted forward by daysShifted days

cases.name: d. terminate cycle (reason 'injury') — status terminated, terminatedAt/terminateReason set
cases.description: Terminating a cycle sets status 'terminated', records terminatedAt and terminateReason; the cycle is no longer returned by activeCycle.
assertions: terminatedAt is a non-null ISO datetime string
cycle appears in getCompletedCycles() (returns status 'completed' or 'terminated')

cases.name: e. restart cycle (fromWeek 3, fromDay 1) — restartBranches +1, new branch isActive
cases.description: Restarting a terminated cycle from a given week/day appends a RestartRecord to restartBranches with isActive true, preserving the original oneRM.
assertions: restartBranches[0].restartDate is a non-null date string

cases.name: f. markMissed (date range) — affected days skipped, batchProcessHistory +1
cases.description: Marking a date range as missed sets the status of affected training days to 'skipped' and appends a BatchProcessRecord (type 'missed_workouts') to batchProcessHistory. Week 1 day offsets are [0,1,3,4,5] from startDate 2026-07-13, so dates 2026-07-14 (day 2) and 2026-07-16 (day 3) are affected.
assertions: batchProcessHistory[0].affectedDays lists each affected {week, day, action}
batchProcessHistory[0].processedAt is a non-null ISO datetime string
TrainingDay.status unchanged for days outside the date range

cases.name: g. makeup missed day — day status makeup, WorkoutRecord status makeup
cases.description: Making up a previously-skipped training day changes TrainingDay.status from 'skipped' to 'makeup', reschedules it to a new date, and produces a WorkoutRecord with status 'makeup' and isRescheduled true.

cases.name: h. week6 decision 'test_1rm' — week6Decision set, status transitions
cases.description: When the cycle reaches week 6 and the user chooses 'test_1rm', week6Decision is recorded and status transitions. Per the CycleStatus union ('active'|'paused'|'week6_pending'|'completed'|'terminated'), the expected terminal status after a test_1rm decision is 'completed'; some implementations may keep 'week6_pending' until the 1RM test result is recorded.
assertions: status === 'completed' OR 'week6_pending' (per implementation; 'completed' if decision finalizes the cycle, 'week6_pending' if it defers until 1RM test results are recorded)
After status becomes 'completed', activeCycle === null and cycle appears in getCompletedCycles()
